product_overview: A feature-sliced React frontend that visualizes and operates job processing pipelines (scrape → extract → match → sculpt → deploy), with editors, ReactFlow canvases, and a global file explorer. The app is built for human-in-the-loop review, document generation, and profile/CV editing using mock-backed data.
core_goals: Provide a clear, stepwise job pipeline UI that surfaces stage status and enables HITL review actions.
Offer rich editing experiences (requirements, documents, CV nodes) with keyboard shortcuts and inline saves.
Expose evidence, scoring, and decision workflows via an interactive graph canvas and decision modal.
Provide a global data explorer and portfolio dashboard for navigation and quick access to job artifacts.
Maintain strict Feature-Sliced structure and atomic UI primitives so pages remain thin and features encapsulated.

features.name: Portfolio Dashboard
features.description: Overview table of all jobs with status badges and a right-hand deadline sidebar for quick triage and navigation to job detail views.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View job list table with status badges -> Click a job row to navigate to job detail at /jobs/tu_berlin/201397 -> See pipeline timeline on the Job Flow Inspector
Navigate to / -> View job list table with status badges -> Click a job row to navigate to job detail at /jobs/tu_berlin/201397 -> See empty state or error banner when summary API fails

features.name: Job Flow Inspector
features.description: Displays pipeline timeline with stage status dots, highlights pending HITL stages, and surfaces a GO TO REVIEW CTA.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397 -> View pipeline timeline with stage status dots -> See pulsing animation on pending_hitl stage -> Click GO TO REVIEW button to navigate to review stage at /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/match
Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397 -> View pipeline timeline with stage status dots -> See error banner when timeline API returns an error -> Click Retry (if shown) to attempt to reload timeline

features.name: Scrape Diagnostics
features.description: Shows scrape metadata, a collapsible preview of source text (with an error screenshot when present), and an ADVANCE action to move the job to extract.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/scrape -> View scrape metadata (URL, HTTP status, timestamp) -> View collapsed source text (max 20 lines) -> Click EXPAND to see full source text -> Click ADVANCE to navigate to extract stage at /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/extract

Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/scrape -> View scrape metadata (URL, HTTP status, timestamp) -> Click EXPAND to see full source text -> See 'source not available' or error placeholder -> Click ADVANCE -> See validation error or disabled ADVANCE state

features.name: Extract and Understand
features.description: Split-pane editor with source text (line-numbered) and an editable requirements list; hovering requirements highlights source spans and editors support inline edits with Ctrl+S save.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/extract -> View source text with line numbers on left -> View requirement list on right -> Hover requirement to highlight corresponding source span -> Click requirement to see JSON in control panel -> Edit requirement text inline -> Press Ctrl+S to save -> See save confirmation

Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/extract -> View source text with line numbers on left -> Edit requirement text inline -> Press Ctrl+S to save -> See save failure or error toast due to network/mock limitation

features.name: Match
features.description: Interactive ReactFlow graph showing requirement and profile nodes, score badges on edges, an EvidenceBank sidebar, and a gate decision modal triggered by keyboard or UI.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/match -> View ReactFlow graph with requirement and profile nodes -> View score badges on edges -> Click a node to see JSON in control panel -> Press Ctrl+Enter to open decision modal -> Click APPROVE in modal to submit gate decision -> See success confirmation

Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/201397/match -> View ReactFlow graph with requirement and profile nodes -> Press Ctrl+Enter to open decision modal -> Click APPROVE in modal -> See submission error or mock-failure banner when POST gate decision fails

features.name: Generate Documents
features.description: Three-tab markdown editor (cv, motivation_letter, application_email) backed by CodeMirror with context panel, dirty state indicator, keyboard shortcuts, and a regeneration modal.
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/999001/sculpt -> View 3 document tabs (cv, motivation_letter, application_email) -> Switch tabs to load different document content -> Edit text in CodeMirror markdown editor -> See dirty indicator amber dot after editing -> Press Ctrl+S to save and clear dirty indicator -> Press Ctrl+Enter to approve tab with check mark -> Click REQUEST REGEN to open regeneration modal -> Fill textarea in regen modal and submit -> See regen success message

Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/999001/sculpt -> Switch to a document tab -> Edit text in CodeMirror markdown editor -> Press Ctrl+S to save -> See save no-op or error due to mock backend -> Click REQUEST REGEN -> Submit regen -> See mocked/regeneration error message

features.name: Package and Deployment
features.description: Mission summary header with visual cue, pipeline checklist, package file list, and a two-step MARK AS DEPLOYED confirmation flow (UI-only in mock mode).
user_flows: Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/999001/deployment -> View MISSION_COMPLETE header with cyan glow -> View pipeline checklist with completion checkmarks -> View list of package files -> Click MARK AS DEPLOYED button -> Confirm deployment in two-step confirmation -> Navigate to /

Navigate to /jobs/tu_berlin/999001/deployment -> Click MARK AS DEPLOYED button -> Confirm deployment in two-step confirmation -> See notification that deployment is simulated/UI-only due to mock backend -> Navigate to /

features.name: Data Explorer
features.description: Split-pane file browser with a collapsible tree, breadcrumb navigation, and previews for JSON, Markdown, and images (JSON preview uses CodeMirror highlighting).
user_flows: Navigate to /explorer -> View split pane with file tree on left and preview on right -> Click folder to expand and see children -> Click file to preview content -> View JSON with CodeMirror syntax highlighting -> Click breadcrumb segment to navigate to parent directory
Navigate to /explorer -> Click file to preview content -> See 'Preview not available' placeholder or error banner for unsupported/failed preview

features.name: Base CV Editor
features.description: ReactFlow canvas of CV entries and skill nodes with a NodeInspector sidebar for editing fields, save via Ctrl+S, and profile stats shown on canvas deselect.
user_flows: Navigate to /cv -> View ReactFlow canvas with entry and skill nodes -> Click entry node to open NodeInspector on the right -> Edit fields in NodeInspector -> Press Ctrl+S to save -> Click canvas background to deselect and see ProfileStats
Navigate to /cv -> Click entry node to open NodeInspector -> Edit fields in NodeInspector -> Press Ctrl+S to save -> See save failure or mock no-op notice indicating changes are not persisted

tech_stack.ui_library: Tailwind CSS v4 (Terran Command design system)

tech_stack.other: react-router-dom v6, @tanstack/react-query v5, @xyflow/react v12, @dagrejs/dagre, @uiw/react-codemirror, react-resizable-panels, lucide-react

File system explorer with tree navigation and JSON/Markdown/image preview
Base CV editor with ReactFlow graph of entries and skills
Job flow inspector with pipeline timeline and HITL CTA
Scrape diagnostics with metadata card, source text preview, and advance button
Extract and understand view with source text pane and editable requirement list
Match view with ReactFlow graph canvas, evidence bank, and decision modal
Generate documents view with 3-tab editor and context panel
Package and deployment view with mission summary, checklist, and deploy CTA

known_limitations.issue: All data served from mock fixtures (VITE_MOCK=true), no real backend
known_limitations.impact: Save and mutate operations are no-ops returning mock data

known_limitations.issue: Deploy CTA navigates to / without real deployment
